name: SoGoSurvey (SoGoCX) Survey Platform API
what_it_does: Enterprise survey and customer experience (CX) platform with REST API — enabling organizations to collect feedback via surveys, measure customer satisfaction, conduct employee experience assessments, and analyze results, with advanced branching logic, anonymous surveys, multi-language support, and integrations with CRM and HR systems via REST API and webhooks.
use_cases: Creating and distributing enterprise surveys via SoGoSurvey API for organizational feedback programs
Measuring employee experience via SoGoSurvey API for HR analytics and engagement tracking
Integrating survey results via SoGoSurvey API into CRM for customer journey analysis
Automating survey distribution via SoGoSurvey API for customer satisfaction programs
Exporting survey data via SoGoSurvey API for data warehouse and BI integration
not_for: Simple one-off surveys without enterprise needs (use Typeform or Google Forms for simple surveys)
Pure NPS/CSAT in-app tools (use Delighted or Survicate for in-app survey widgets)
Consumer-facing research panels (SoGoSurvey is B2B enterprise focused)
best_when: An enterprise HR or CX team needs a compliance-conscious survey platform with advanced branching, anonymous surveys, and integration API for employee engagement or customer feedback programs.
avoid_when: You need simple survey tools, consumer research panels, or developer-friendly APIs with extensive documentation.

auth.notes: API key authentication via request header. API key from account settings. No OAuth2. Webhooks for survey response events. REST API access on Business and Enterprise plans. Limited public API documentation — primarily for Enterprise customers. Contact sales for API access details.

pricing.notes: US company (Herndon, VA). Founded 2007. Rebranded from SoGoSurvey to include SoGoCX (customer experience) and SoGoEX (employee experience) products. 500,000+ users. Used by: banks, hospitals, universities. Features: advanced branching, piping, quotas, offline surveys, kiosk mode. Multi-language (50+). Customizable themes. Anonymous surveys for sensitive HR data. GDPR compliant. HIPAA compliant on Enterprise plan. API on Business/Enterprise plans. Integrations: Salesforce, HubSpot, Zapier, Microsoft Teams.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: API key auth. Webhooks. GDPR/HIPAA. US company. API on Business+ plan. Limited public docs. Enterprise focus. 500K+ users.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Survey reads idempotent by survey ID. Response reads idempotent. Webhook events: implement idempotent handlers. Survey creation not idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API access requires Business or Enterprise plan ($99+/month)
Limited public API documentation — enterprise-tier documentation provided after sales engagement
Multiple product lines: SoGoSurvey (surveys) vs SoGoCX (CX) vs SoGoEX (employee) — different APIs
HIPAA compliance available on Enterprise plan — required for healthcare survey use cases
Anonymous surveys: respondent data not stored — cannot retrieve respondent PII even via API
Webhooks for response events — implement idempotent handlers for at-least-once delivery

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. API key auth. GDPR/HIPAA compliant. SOC2 certified. US data residency. Anonymous survey mode protects respondent PII. Healthcare survey data sensitivity requires HIPAA BAA on Enterprise. No OAuth2. HIPAA on Enterprise plan — verify BAA process.
